nodes.name: A01 — Monday 07:00 Kick-off
nodes.notes: Fires every Monday at 07:00. Starts CoachMentor weekly content planning cycle.

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: grassroots football coaching tips UK {{ $now.format('MMMM yyyy') }}

nodes.name: A02 — Search: Coaching Trends
nodes.notes: Searches for grassroots coaching news, FA announcements, and coaching method trends this month.

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: Verwood Town FC fixtures results {{ $now.format('MMMM yyyy') }}

nodes.name: A03 — Search: Verwood FC Fixtures
nodes.notes: Fetches Verwood Town FC fixture and results data for match-week reactive content hooks.

string.name: verwoodResults
string.value: ={{ $('A03 — Search: Verwood FC Fixtures').item.json.web?.results?.slice(0,2).map(r => r.title + ': ' + r.description).join(' | ') || 'No fixture data' }}

nodes.name: A04 — Merge Search Results
nodes.notes: Combines search results into clean variables for the Claude prompt.

nodes.name: A05 — Claude: Generate Weekly Content Plan
nodes.notes: Main Claude call. Generates full week content plan across TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Instagram, X. Returns structured JSON.

nodes.name: A06 — Parse Claude Response
nodes.notes: Extracts contentPlan object and overall confidence score from Claude's JSON response.

nodes.name: A07 — Copyright / Originality Gate (≥0.80)
nodes.notes: CRITICAL for CoachMentor: Routes based on Claude's originality/confidence score. ≥0.80 = auto-approved. <0.80 = Slack alert for human review before any publishing.

nodes.name: A08 — Slack: Content Needs Review
nodes.notes: Sends Slack alert when originality is below threshold. Blocks publishing until human approves.

nodes.name: A09 — Log Run to CoachMentor CRM
nodes.notes: Logs approved weekly plan to Airtable CRM. Stores week theme, confidence, and content item counts.

nodes.name: A10 — Queue TikTok Scripts (Wait for Recording)
nodes.notes: Queues TikTok content. Note: TikTok requires video file upload. Scripts are sent to Notion recording queue for Ricky to record at Verwood FC pitch. Videos then uploaded and published via this node.

nodes.name: A11 — Schedule YouTube Short (Wednesday 08:00)
nodes.notes: Schedules YouTube Short for Wednesday 8am. Uses YouTube Data API v3. Video must be pre-uploaded to Supabase/GCS and referenced here.

nodes.name: A12 — Schedule IG Post (Monday 19:00)
nodes.notes: Creates IG media container. Followed by publish step after 30s delay. Scheduled for Monday 7pm — coaches browsing after training.

nodes.name: A13 — Post X Thread (Monday 12:00)
nodes.notes: Posts first tweet of Monday thread. Subsequent tweets in thread use reply_to_tweet_id from this response. Monday 12pm = coaching community peak discussion window.

nodes.name: B01 — Poll Engagement (Every 6h)
nodes.notes: Runs every 6 hours. Checks TikTok and IG for posts crossing the 300-view / 3-comment engagement threshold.

nodes.name: B02 — Fetch TikTok Video Stats
nodes.notes: Fetches recent video stats from TikTok API. Filters for videos crossing 300 views threshold.

nodes.name: B03 — Fetch IG Media Stats
nodes.notes: Fetches Instagram media stats. Looks for posts with 300+ reach or 3+ comments.

nodes.name: B04 — Threshold Check (300 views / 3 comments)
nodes.notes: Routes only high-performing content for subscriber funnel. Below threshold content is ignored.

nodes.name: B05 — Claude: Classify Intent
nodes.notes: Claude classifies engagement intent: coach, parent, player, or unknown. Only coaches get DM offer.

nodes.name: B06 — Coach Intent Gate
nodes.notes: Only coach-intent users proceed to DM sequence. Parents and players are tagged for lookalike audience only.

nodes.name: B07 — Claude: Generate Personalised DM
nodes.notes: Generates a personalised, context-aware DM referencing the specific content the person engaged with. Sounds like a real coach, not marketing copy.

nodes.name: B08 — Send DM (X/Twitter or IG via ManyChat)
nodes.notes: Sends DM via X API v2 for X engagements. For IG engagements, this calls ManyChat API to trigger the trial offer flow. Switch URL based on platform variable.

nodes.name: B09 — Wait 48h (Conversion Check)
nodes.notes: Waits 48 hours after DM send before checking if trial was started. Maximum 1 follow-up DM if no conversion.

nodes.name: B10 — Check Trial Started in CRM
nodes.notes: Checks Airtable Subscribers table for trial_started flag. CoachMentor app backend writes this record when a trial begins.

nodes.name: C01 — Friday 15:00 Fixture Check
nodes.notes: Fires every Friday at 3pm. Checks Verwood FC fixture list for weekend and scans for FA/grassroots events.

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: Verwood Town FC Saturday fixture {{ $now.plus({days:1}).toFormat('d MMMM yyyy') }}

nodes.name: C02 — Search: Weekend Fixture
nodes.notes: Searches for this weekend's Verwood Town FC fixture. Used as context for reactive match-day content.

nodes.name: C03 — Claude: Match-Day Content
nodes.notes: Generates Sat 7:30am TikTok, 8am X thread, 9am IG story question, and Sun 6pm coaching question thread.

nodes.name: C04 — Wait Until Saturday 07:30
nodes.notes: Holds until Saturday 7:30am — optimal time to catch coaches as they prepare for morning kickoffs.

nodes.name: C05 — Post Saturday X Thread (08:00)
nodes.notes: Posts Saturday morning tactical tip thread. Times to land in coaches' feeds before they leave for the pitch.

nodes.name: C06 — Wait Until Sunday 18:00
nodes.notes: Holds until Sunday 6pm — coaches reflecting on the day, highest engagement window for coaching discussion on X.

nodes.name: C07 — Post Sunday Coaching Question (18:00)
nodes.notes: Posts the weekly 'Coaching Question of the Week' thread Sunday 6pm. Replies from coaches feed into B01 subscriber funnel via engagement monitoring.

main.node: A05 — Claude: Generate Weekly Content Plan
A09 — Log Run to CoachMentor CRM
A10 — Queue TikTok Scripts (Wait for Recording)
B08 — Send DM (X/Twitter or IG via ManyChat)
B10 — Check Trial Started in CRM

required_credentials: Slack Bot Token (optional, for review alerts)
_readme.copyright_note: The originality gate (Node A07) is critical. All content must score ≥0.80 before publishing. This protects against accidentally reproducing FA or UEFA licensed coaching materials.
